text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen—a race that holds a special
meaning for Maruzensky. It's said that if she'd
entered, she might have found a new archrival
there...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But now, Sakura Chiyono O proudly declares that she's Maruzensky's rival. She's overflowing with passion as she readies for the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When she enters the paddock, she's surprised to
see Mr. C.B. there.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Could this be a battle between two heirs of
legends? No... Today is a celebration of the two
formidable racers on the track here and now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The race between Mr. C.B. and Sakura Chiyono O
is about to begin!
